title: Ganga boat iftar: Varanasi Court remands all 14 accused to judicial custody for 14 days
description: Fourteen Muslim men, who were booked for hosting an Iftar on a boat on Ganga, were remanded to to judicial custody for 14 days by a Varanasi court.Additional Chief Judicial Magistrate Amit Kumar Yadav passed the order on March 19. "On the basis of the case diary and other police documents, there are sufficient grounds at this stage to grant remand of the accused persons. The directions of the Hon’ble Supreme Court regarding arrest have been complied with as far as possible. Therefore, considerin
